title: pterotheca caspica
intro: Pterotheca caspica, also known as the Caspian pterotheca, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae. This plant is native to the Caspian region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pterotheca caspica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
